case_title: WISEGARVER & ASSOCIATES INC. VS. LU JIAN FU ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE JOEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS MANAGER FOR WISEGARVER & ASSOCIATES, INC., AND DEFENDANTS LU JIAN FU & CHEN YAN YI. BRIAN ZHAO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. FU & MS. YI. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $294.62 FILED BY WISEGARVER & ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FU, LU JIAN YI, CHEN YAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
